title: Parents' Experiences of Peer Support Groups as Part of Non-institutional Social Care in Child Welfare 2020
description: This dataset consists of individual and group interviews on parents' experiences of peer support groups as part of non-institutional social care in child welfare. The data include individual, pair and group interviews with six participants. Individual interviews were conducted over the phone while pair and group interviews were conducted face-to-face.
